steps.title: Compare Green's two reactions
steps.content: Green found the 2016 version's storytelling very confusing, but he enthusiastically praised the 2019 Broadway version's storytelling. The inference should explain that shift in his opinion.

steps.title: Infer improvement over time
steps.content: A says 2016 had fewer storytelling problems, which reverses the evidence. B discusses production size, not Green's storytelling judgment. C says 2019 was less enjoyable, which conflicts with the praise. The shift points to major improvement. The answer is D.
